title: 通过标准化进行 ODRL 政策比较
content:
arXiv:2603.12926v1 公告类型：新 
摘要：ODRL 语言已成为表示数字版权政策和法规的标准。然而其复杂性对其使用造成了障碍，这导致许多相关的理论和实践工作侧重于不同的而不是整体的。
original_content:
arXiv:2603.12926v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The ODRL language has become the standard for representing policies and regulations for digital rights. However its complexity is a barrier to its usage, which has caused many related theoretical and practical works to focus on different, and not inte

title: 中国的OpenClaw热潮是人工智能公司的淘金热
content: 围绕开源代理的炒作正在促使人们租用云服务器并购买人工智能订阅只是为了尝试一下，这为科技公司创造了意外之财。
original_title: China’s OpenClaw Boom Is a Gold Rush for AI Companies
original_content: Hype around the open source agent is driving people to rent cloud servers and buy AI subscriptions just to try it, creating a windfall for tech companies.

title: “恐怖谷”：Anthropic 的国防部诉讼、战争迷因和人工智能将取代风险投资工作
content: 在今天的节目中，我们将讨论人类与国防部之间的传奇故事还远未结束。
original_title: ‘Uncanny Valley’: Anthropic’s DOD Lawsuit, War Memes, and AI Coming for VC Jobs
original_content: In today’s episode, we discuss how the saga between Anthropic and the Department of Defense is far from over.

title: Grammarly 因其人工智能“专家审查”功能面临集体诉讼
content: 该功能周三被 Grammarly 关闭，它提出的编辑建议就好像来自知名作家和学者——未经他们的同意。
original_title: Grammarly Is Facing a Class Action Lawsuit Over Its AI ‘Expert Review’ Feature
original_content: The feature, which Grammarly shut down Wednesday, presented editing suggestions as if they came from established authors and academics—without their consent.

title: Nvidia 版本的 OpenClaw 可以解决其最大的问题：安全性
content: Nvidia 宣布推出一个名为 NemoClaw 的开放式企业 AI 代理平台，该平台是在病毒式传播的 OpenClaw 基础上构建的。
original_title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
original_content: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

title: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 xAI 面临未成年人的儿童色情诉讼 Grok 涉嫌脱衣
content: 这三名原告正在寻求代表任何拥有他们未成年时真实图像并被 Grok 修改为色情内容的人。
original_title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
original_content: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

title: 人工智能精神病案件背后的律师警告大规模伤亡风险
content: 多年来，人工智能聊天机器人一直与自杀有关。现在，一位律师表示，它们也出现在大规模伤亡案件中，而且技术的发展速度快于保障措施。
original_title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
original_content: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

title: Nvidia 推出 Vera CPU，专为 Agentic AI 打造
original_title: Nvidia Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI
